videos.description:

Want the Best? Wacom Intuos Pro: https://amzn.to/49kiHb3 (affiliate link)

videos.title: A More Affordable 5k Mac Monitor- ASUS ProArt PA27JCV
videos.description:
NEW COURSES: http://bradsartschool.com
Asus ProArt 5K PA27JCV - https://amzn.to/4vMrQ5Y (affiliate link)

I tested out the Apple Studio Display and the XDR version. They  are great displays. They are also very expensive. SO what other 5k displays are out there? Meet the ASUS Pro Art 5K display. It does a lot of things right but it does cut some corners to keep that price down.

videos.title: Macbook Neo Review
videos.description:
NEW COURSES: http://bradsartschool.com
Macbook Neo: https://amzn.to/4tOdG2j (affiliate link)

Everything I know about computers tells me this should be totally underpowered and not worth anyone's time or attention. But going hands on with the MacBook NEO really surprised me. Jumping into Photoshop and Premier and making it my main computer for a week left me in awe with what Apple has done here.

-----------------------------------------------------
